title: Tunneling Triumph Under the Sea

story: Bobby Hutcherson made music sparkle with his magical touch on the vibraphone. Born in Los Angeles on January 27, 1941, he grew up to become a jazz legend. Hutcherson's fingers danced across the metal bars, creating dreamy melodies like 'Little B's Poem'. He even joined the cool cats of the SFJAZZ Collective, spreading joy through his unique sound.
activity_question: What instrument was Bobby Hutcherson famous for playing?
bonus_fact: The vibraphone looks like a giant xylophone with a motor that makes the notes shimmer and vibrate.

title: Musical Maestro Born in Bali
story: A musical genius took his first breath in Denpasar, Bali. Jaya Suprana, born in 1949, would grow up to become a talented pianist, composer, and conductor. But his talents didn't stop there! This creative powerhouse also became a writer, educator, and even a television presenter. On January 27, Indonesia welcomed a true Renaissance man.
activity_question: What three musical talents did Jaya Suprana possess?
follow_up_question: Can you name another job Jaya Suprana had besides his musical roles?
